recruitment.blocked_state: Companions cannot be changed during events, festivals, menus, or minigames.
recruitment.unsupported: {{npc}} is not a safe companion target right now.
recruitment.request_sent: Sent a companion request for {{npc}} to the host.
management.dismiss_all_confirm: Dismiss all companions from your squad?
commands.no_followers: No available companion can take that command.
tasks.need_axe: Equip an axe before asking a companion to chop.
tasks.need_pickaxe: Equip a pickaxe before asking a companion to mine.
tasks.need_watering_can: Equip a watering can on this companion before asking them to water crops.
tasks.watering_can_empty: This companion's watering can is empty. Remove it, refill it, and equip it again.
tasks.bee_flower_protected: That flower is protected because a nearby bee house depends on it.
squad.inventory_disabled_empty: Squad inventory is disabled and empty.
squad.withdraw_complete: All squad items were moved to your inventory.
squad.withdraw_partial: Some squad items stayed stored because your inventory is full.
chest_destination.title: Companion deposit
chest_destination.stale: That chest is no longer available at the expected location.
chest_destination.identity_timeout: The host couldn't confirm that exact chest. Reopen it and try again.
chest_destination.unchanged: That chest assignment is already up to date.
chest_destination.cleared: This chest is no longer a companion destination.
chest_destination.all_set: All companions will use this chest unless you assign a later individual override.
chest_destination.all_cleared: The shared companion destination was cleared.
chest_destination.companion_cleared: {{npc}} will no longer use this individual chest assignment.
chest_destination.deposit_unavailable: {{npc}} could not find or access the assigned deposit chest.
chest_destination.deposit_partial: {{npc}} deposited some items, but the chest could not take everything.
chest_destination.deposit_full: The assigned chest could not take any of {{npc}}'s carried items.
companion.panel.title: Companions
companion.routine.enabled_hint: Enable or pause this hourly routine.
companion.routine.repeat_hint: Repeat every day, or run only on the day this edit is saved.
companion.routine.completion_hint: Choose what happens when scheduled work or a deposit finishes.
companion.routine.quick_shift_hint: Fill 06:00–17:59 with the selected work activity, use the completion behavior afterward, and activate the routine.
companion.routine.save_hint: Save all twenty hourly cells atomically. A concurrent edit is rejected instead of overwritten.
companion.routine.area_missing_hint: {{activity}} needs a preset. Mark a manual area for this companion and specialty; the scheduled block will wait for it.
companion.routine.paint_hint: Select {{activity}}, then paint hourly cells. Painting activates the routine.
companion.routine.hour_hint: {{hour}}: {{activity}}. Click to replace it with the selected activity.
companion.routine.save_conflict: This routine changed elsewhere. Reopen the panel before saving again.
companion.routine.save_invalid: That routine payload is invalid and was ignored.
companion.routine.area_missing: {{npc}} has no saved {{specialty}} area. That work block will wait and retry after you mark one.
companion.panel.work_hint: Hover an order to preview what the companion will do.
companion.panel.recall_hover: Bring {{npc}} back to you and resume following.
companion.quick.title: Squad
companion.quick.work_hover: Send {{npc}} to work nearby, focusing on {{specialty}}.
companion.quick.configured_autonomy_hove: {{npc}} is working through an Autonomous task mode. Click to switch to the {{specialty}} specialty.
companion.quick.work_enabled_tasks: Companion tasks were enabled. {{npc}} will work nearby, focusing on {{specialty}}.
companion.quick.recall_sent: Sent a request to the host to recall {{npc}}.
companion.quick.more_hover: {{count}} companions hidden. Open the full panel.
wheel.no_target: None of your companions is available on this map.
wheel.no_context: Point at an NPC, supported resource, or safe empty ground.
wheel.no_safe_ground: That spot isn't empty, safe, and reachable.
wheel.no_worker_available: No companion can safely reach that target right now.
wheel.remote_crop_unsupported: Farmhand-owned companions can't harvest crops safely yet; Stardew would credit the host.
fishing.no_rod: No available companion on this map has a fishing rod.
fishing.no_safe_shore: No companion with a fishing rod could reach a safe shore on that body of water.
fishing.rod_removed: {{npc}} stopped fishing because their fishing rod was removed.
fishing.sent_partial: Sent {{count}} of {{total}} companions to the {{target}}; the others couldn't reach a safe shore.
wheel.sent_partial: Sent {{count}} of {{total}} companions to the {{target}}; the others had no safe adjacent tile.
wheel.sent_to_wait: Sent {{npc}} to wait at the selected spot.
wheel.arrived_to_wait: {{npc}} is waiting at the selected spot.
wheel.wait_move_failed: {{npc}} couldn't reach the spot and is waiting where they stopped.
wheel.wait_move_cancelled: {{npc}} became unavailable, so the movement order was cancelled.
work_area.invalid: That work area command is no longer valid or safe.
work_area.modes_disabled: Enable the task mode required by this kind of work area.
work_area.empty: No supported work targets were found inside that circle.
work_area.equipment_mismatch: Nearby companions don't have the tools needed for the targets inside that circle.
companion.preview.inactive: turn on a work command to preview a target
companion.preview.planning: planning work on the next update
companion.preview.disabled_after_click: click would turn this command off
companion.preview.work_modes_disabled: enable lumbering or mining before starting nearby work
companion.inventory.title: {{npc}} inventory
companion.equipment.title: Equipment
companion.equipment.hint: Select a matching tool in your toolbar to equip or swap it. Select an empty toolbar slot to remove it.
companion.equipment.wrong_tool: Select a {{slot}} in your toolbar, or select an empty slot to remove the equipped tool.
companion.equipment.unavailable: That equipped tool is currently unavailable and could not be moved.
companion.equipment.enchantments_unsuppo: Remove all enchantments before equipping this tool on a companion.
companion.equipment.attachments_unsuppor: Remove all bait and tackle before equipping this fishing rod.
companion.equipment.unsupported: This tool has custom state that cannot be preserved safely.
companion.hat.equip_hint: Select a hat in your toolbar, then click this slot to equip it.
companion.hat.replace_hint: {{hat}} is equipped. Select another hat to replace it, or an empty toolbar slot to remove it.
companion.hat.unavailable_hint: This custom hat is unavailable. Restore its content pack before replacing or removing it.
companion.hat.select: Select a hat in your toolbar, or an empty slot to remove the equipped hat.
companion.hat.unsupported: {{npc}} can't use this cosmetic hat slot.
companion.hat.unavailable: That equipped hat is currently unavailable.
companion.hat.inventory_full: Your inventory is full, so the hat stayed equipped.
multiplayer.command_stale: That command used an outdated companion view. The panel was refreshed; please try again.
multiplayer.command_failed: The host could not complete that companion command. Check the SMAPI log for details.
companion.task_failure.target_reserved: target is reserved by another companion
companion.task_failure.protected_target: target is protected and cannot be changed safely
companion.task_failure.bee_flower_protec: flower is protected for a nearby bee house
companion.task_failure.inventory_full_wo: inventory was full, reward dropped nearby
companion.task_failure.unexpected_error: task was cancelled after an unexpected content error
companion.task_failure.remote_harvest_un: farmhand crop harvesting is disabled to preserve the correct item and XP owner
companion.task_failure.npc_missing: NPC content is currently unavailable; companion data was preserved
companion.task_failure.work_area_unavail: marked work area is temporarily unavailable
companion.task_failure.work_area_blocked: targets remain in the marked area, but no safe route is available
companion.task_failure.routine_area_miss: the routine has no saved area for this specialty
companion.task_failure.routine_unavailab: the original NPC routine could not be restored
companion.task_failure.fishing_water_los: the selected body of water is no longer available
companion.task_failure.fishing_no_safe_s: no safe route to the shore is available
state.unavailable: Pelican Companions found incompatible or damaged save data. Its features are disabled for this session to prevent item or world-state loss; check the SMAPI log.
companion.movement_debug.title: Movement debug - {{formation}}
companion.skill.learn_action: Click or press confirm to learn.
companion.skill.progression_disabled: Companion progression is disabled in the mod settings.
skills.combat_1.name: Steady Strike
skills.combat_1.description: Increases companion combat damage by 10 percent.
skills.combat_2.name: Finisher
skills.combat_2.description: Adds another 10 percent combat damage bonus.
skills.lumber_1.name: Lumberjack's Arm
skills.lumber_1.description: Adds one effective upgrade level to the axe used by this companion, up to Iridium.
skills.lumber_2.name: Quick Chop
skills.lumber_2.description: Reduces wood hit cooldown by 10 percent.
skills.lumber_3.name: Clean Cut
skills.lumber_3.description: Adds a chance for one extra wood when a companion clears a full tree.
skills.mining_1.name: Stonebreaker
skills.mining_1.description: Adds one effective upgrade level to the pickaxe used by this companion, up to Iridium.
skills.mining_2.name: Miner's Rhythm
skills.mining_2.description: Reduces mining hit cooldown by 10 percent.
skills.mining_3.name: Eye for Ore
skills.mining_3.description: Adds a small chance for one extra ore when this companion breaks an ore node.
skills.utility_1.name: Quick Step
skills.utility_1.description: Retries blocked paths toward work targets 20 percent sooner.
skills.utility_2.name: Task Focus
skills.utility_2.description: Increases work search radius by one tile for this companion.
skills.utility_3.name: Safe Return
skills.utility_3.description: Lets this companion return to the player sooner after tasks.
skills.fishing_1.name: Patient Angler
skills.fishing_1.description: Shortens the interval between fishing catches from 60 to 50 in-game minutes.
skills.fishing_2.name: Deep-Water Cast
skills.fishing_2.description: Adds one tile of casting range and raises the minimum fish quality by one tier.
skills.fishing_3.name: Double Haul
skills.fishing_3.description: Adds a 25 percent chance to catch one extra fish.
dialogue.Recruit.generic: I'll come along for a while.
dialogue.Idle.night: We should keep an eye on the time.
dialogue.Idle.spring: The valley feels ready for a fresh start.
dialogue.Idle.summer: The long summer light gives us plenty of time to get things done.
dialogue.Idle.fall: The air smells like leaves and a busy harvest.
dialogue.Idle.winter: The cold makes good company matter even more.
dialogue.Idle.rain: Rain changes the rhythm of the whole valley.
dialogue.Idle.storm: Let's keep an eye on the lightning.
dialogue.Idle.snow: Everything sounds quieter under the snow.
dialogue.Idle.green_rain: This green rain makes the valley feel like another world.
dialogue.Idle.friend: We've been through a lot together, haven't we?
dialogue.Mining.generic: That rock did not stand a chance.
dialogue.Fishing_Waiting.generic: I'll try my luck here until you need me.
dialogue.FriendshipTooLow.generic: Maybe after we know each other better.
dialogue.WorkAreaComplete.generic: This area is finished. I'll wait here.
dialogue.Abigail.Recruit: This sounds like an adventure. I'm in.
dialogue.Abigail.Dismiss: I'll head back, but tell me when the next adventure starts.
dialogue.Abigail.Idle: There is always something interesting around the next corner.
dialogue.Abigail.Idle.rain: Rain makes everything feel a little more mysterious.
dialogue.Abigail.Idle.place: Now this is my kind of place.
dialogue.Abigail.Task.Mining: Let's see what this rock is hiding.
dialogue.Abigail.TaskFailure: That did not work. Give me a second to rethink it.
dialogue.Alex.Recruit: Sure. A little teamwork will be good training.
dialogue.Alex.Dismiss: I'm calling it for today. Good hustle out there.
dialogue.Alex.Idle: Keeping up with you is a decent workout.
dialogue.Alex.Idle.rain: A little rain never stopped a good training day.
dialogue.Alex.Idle.night: We put in a full day. Nice work.
dialogue.Alex.Idle.place: There is plenty here to keep us moving.
dialogue.Alex.Task.Petting: Easy there. Animals respond to confidence.
dialogue.Alex.TaskFailure: That play fell apart. We'll adjust and try again.
dialogue.Caroline.Recruit: I'd be happy to come along and help.
dialogue.Caroline.Dismiss: I'll go home and put the kettle on.
dialogue.Caroline.Idle: It is nice to step away from the shop for a while.
dialogue.Caroline.Idle.rain: The rain is doing half the garden work for us.
dialogue.Caroline.Idle.night: We should slow down before it gets too late.
dialogue.Caroline.Idle.place: The farm always gives me new gardening ideas.
dialogue.Caroline.Task.Watering: A careful drink of water makes all the difference.
dialogue.Caroline.TaskFailure: Something is wrong here. Let's not force it.
dialogue.Clint.Recruit: You want me along? All right. I know my way around tools.
dialogue.Clint.Dismiss: I'll get back to the forge.
dialogue.Clint.Idle: I am better with metal than conversation, but this is all right.
dialogue.Clint.Idle.rain: Rain is good weather for staying near the forge.
dialogue.Clint.Idle.night: It got late faster than I expected.
dialogue.Clint.Idle.place: At least I know what I'm doing down here.
dialogue.Clint.Task.Mining: The stone tells you where to strike, if you listen.
dialogue.Clint.TaskFailure: No. That angle is not going to work.
dialogue.Demetrius.Dismiss: I have enough observations for today.
dialogue.Demetrius.Idle: This is a useful chance to observe the local ecosystem.
dialogue.Demetrius.Idle.rain: Rain changes animal and plant behavior almost immediately.
dialogue.Demetrius.Idle.night: Nocturnal activity should be increasing now.
dialogue.Demetrius.Idle.place: Your farm is a remarkably complex little ecosystem.
dialogue.Demetrius.Task.Foraging: This specimen is worth a closer look.
dialogue.Demetrius.TaskFailure: The conditions do not support a safe attempt.
dialogue.Dwarf.Recruit: I will travel with you. Your surface paths are strange.
dialogue.Dwarf.Dismiss: I return to the quiet stones.
dialogue.Dwarf.Idle: Your world has an impressive number of open spaces.
dialogue.Dwarf.Idle.rain: Water falling from the sky is still very strange.
dialogue.Dwarf.Idle.night: Darkness makes this place feel more familiar.
dialogue.Dwarf.Task.Mining: This stone has a promising sound.
dialogue.Dwarf.TaskFailure: The stone refuses. We should choose another path.
dialogue.Elliott.Recruit: A shared journey may be exactly the inspiration I need.
dialogue.Elliott.Dismiss: I shall return to the shore and my unfinished pages.
dialogue.Elliott.Idle: Every path seems to carry the beginning of a story.
dialogue.Elliott.Idle.rain: Rain gives the valley a wonderfully dramatic rhythm.
dialogue.Elliott.Idle.night: Even the quietest road becomes poetic at night.
dialogue.Elliott.Idle.place: The sea air clears the mind beautifully.
dialogue.Elliott.Task.Foraging: A small treasure, waiting for the right observer.
dialogue.Elliott.TaskFailure: Our effort met an inelegant obstacle. We should reconsider.
dialogue.Emily.Recruit: Of course! The energy around this feels wonderful.
dialogue.Emily.Dismiss: I'll go recharge for a while. Take care of yourself.
dialogue.Emily.Idle: The valley feels especially bright when we move together.
dialogue.Emily.Idle.rain: Rain gives every color a softer glow.
dialogue.Emily.Idle.night: The night has a calm, creative energy.
dialogue.Emily.Idle.place: There is a warm, living energy all across this farm.
dialogue.Emily.Task.Petting: A gentle heart is the best way to greet an animal.
dialogue.Emily.TaskFailure: The energy is blocked here. We should try another way.
dialogue.Evelyn.Recruit: I'd be delighted to keep you company, dear.
dialogue.Evelyn.Dismiss: I'll head home now. Don't stay out too late.
dialogue.Evelyn.Idle: A pleasant walk and useful work make a lovely day.
dialogue.Evelyn.Idle.rain: The gardens will be grateful for this rain.
dialogue.Evelyn.Idle.night: It is getting late, dear. Mind your step.
dialogue.Evelyn.Idle.place: Your farm has grown into such a welcoming place.
dialogue.Evelyn.Task.Watering: Just enough water, and plenty of patience.
dialogue.Evelyn.TaskFailure: That spot needs a different touch. We can leave it be.
dialogue.George.Recruit: All right, but don't expect me to enjoy the fuss.
dialogue.George.Dismiss: I've had enough wandering for one day.
dialogue.George.Idle: People miss useful things because they never look down.
dialogue.George.Idle.rain: Rain gets into every joint. Let's make this worthwhile.
dialogue.George.Idle.night: We should have finished before dark.
dialogue.George.Idle.place: Hmph. You've put a lot of honest work into this place.
dialogue.George.Task.Foraging: There. Useful, and nobody had to make a speech about it.
dialogue.George.TaskFailure: It's blocked. Complaining won't move it, so pick another job.
dialogue.Gus.Recruit: Gladly. Good company makes any job lighter.
dialogue.Gus.Dismiss: I'll get back to the saloon. Come by when you're hungry.
dialogue.Gus.Idle: Working together is a lot like running a kitchen.
dialogue.Gus.Idle.rain: Rainy days always make people crave something warm.
dialogue.Gus.Idle.night: It is nearly time for the late crowd.
dialogue.Gus.Idle.place: Fresh ingredients start with a well-tended farm.
dialogue.Gus.TaskFailure: No good. Better to stop than spoil the whole batch.
dialogue.Haley.Recruit: Fine, but we are not walking through mud all day.
dialogue.Haley.Dismiss: I'm heading back before my hair becomes a disaster.
dialogue.Haley.Idle: The light out here is actually pretty good today.
dialogue.Haley.Idle.rain: Rain is terrible for photos, but the colors do look richer.
dialogue.Haley.Idle.night: This would be perfect golden-hour light if it were earlier.
dialogue.Haley.Idle.place: Okay, the farm can be beautiful from the right angle.
dialogue.Haley.Task.Harvesting: That one is ready, and it actually looks perfect.
dialogue.Haley.TaskFailure: Nope. That is not happening without ruining something.
dialogue.Harvey.Recruit: Certainly. A walk will be good for both of us.
dialogue.Harvey.Dismiss: I should return to the clinic and finish my notes.
dialogue.Harvey.Idle: A steady pace is healthier than rushing everywhere.
dialogue.Harvey.Idle.rain: Keep warm in this rain. Getting chilled is no joke.
dialogue.Harvey.Idle.night: We should think about rest before much longer.
dialogue.Harvey.Idle.place: Fresh air and regular activity are excellent for you.
dialogue.Harvey.Task.Foraging: This looks useful, but let's handle it carefully.
dialogue.Harvey.TaskFailure: We should stop. Forcing it would be the unsafe choice.
dialogue.Jas.Recruit: Okay! Can I help with the animals too?
dialogue.Jas.Dismiss: I should go back now. Thank you for letting me help.
dialogue.Jas.Idle: It's more fun exploring when someone comes with you.
dialogue.Jas.Idle.rain: The rain makes tiny rivers along the path.
dialogue.Jas.Idle.night: It feels a little spooky this late.
dialogue.Jas.Idle.place: There are so many friendly animals around here.
dialogue.Jas.Task.Petting: Hi, little one. I brought gentle pats.
dialogue.Jas.TaskFailure: I can't do it from here. Maybe there is another way.
dialogue.Jodi.Recruit: I can come along. It will be nice to change the routine.
dialogue.Jodi.Dismiss: I'll head home and see what still needs doing.
dialogue.Jodi.Idle: It feels good to finish something with a clear result.
dialogue.Jodi.Idle.rain: Rain means one less chore for the gardens.
dialogue.Jodi.Idle.night: We should wrap up before everyone starts worrying.
dialogue.Jodi.Idle.place: A farm never runs out of work, does it?
dialogue.Jodi.Task.Harvesting: This is ready. Let's gather it before it goes to waste.
dialogue.Jodi.TaskFailure: Something is in the way. We should leave this one alone.
dialogue.Kent.Recruit: Understood. I'll stay alert and follow your lead.
dialogue.Kent.Dismiss: I'm returning home. Stay aware of your surroundings.
dialogue.Kent.Idle: A clear route and a simple objective help.
dialogue.Kent.Idle.rain: Rain covers small sounds. Keep your eyes open.
dialogue.Kent.Idle.night: Visibility is dropping. We should stay close.
dialogue.Kent.Idle.place: Open ground makes it easier to watch every approach.
dialogue.Kent.Task.Lumbering: Clear the obstacle, then check the path again.
dialogue.Kent.TaskFailure: Stop. The route is compromised; we'll approach differently.
dialogue.Krobus.Recruit: I would like to see the valley beside you.
dialogue.Krobus.Dismiss: I will return to the shadows for now.
dialogue.Krobus.Idle: The sunlight is easier to bear with a friend nearby.
dialogue.Krobus.Idle.rain: Rain makes the surface smell deep and ancient.
dialogue.Krobus.Idle.night: Night feels gentle to creatures like me.
dialogue.Krobus.Idle.place: These tunnels feel safe and familiar.
dialogue.Krobus.Task.Mining: This stone carries a quiet underground echo.
dialogue.Krobus.TaskFailure: Something here is unsafe. The shadows warn me away.
dialogue.Leah.Recruit: Absolutely. Working outdoors together sounds perfect.
dialogue.Leah.Dismiss: I'll head back to my cabin and clean up.
dialogue.Leah.Idle: The shape of the landscape changes with every small choice.
dialogue.Leah.Idle.rain: Rain brings out the texture in bark and stone.
dialogue.Leah.Idle.night: The silhouettes are beautiful this late.
dialogue.Leah.Idle.place: Your farm has a strong shape, like a work still being carved.
dialogue.Leah.Task.Lumbering: A clean cut will keep the area healthy.
dialogue.Leah.TaskFailure: The material is resisting. We should not damage it carelessly.
dialogue.Leo.Recruit: Yes! We can watch out for each other.
dialogue.Leo.Dismiss: I will go where the birds can find me.
dialogue.Leo.Idle: The land always leaves clues for anyone who listens.
dialogue.Leo.Idle.rain: Rain makes every leaf speak at once.
dialogue.Leo.Idle.night: At night, you can hear which creatures are still awake.
dialogue.Leo.Idle.place: This air feels like home to me.
dialogue.Leo.Task.Foraging: The forest offered us something useful.
dialogue.Leo.TaskFailure: The path says no. We should listen and turn back.
dialogue.Lewis.Recruit: Of course. A mayor should understand the work being done.
dialogue.Lewis.Dismiss: I'll return to town and finish the day's paperwork.
dialogue.Lewis.Idle: Pelican Town works best when everyone lends a hand.
dialogue.Lewis.Idle.rain: This rain should be good for the valley's crops.
dialogue.Lewis.Idle.night: It is late enough that I should check the town square.
dialogue.Lewis.Idle.place: The condition of this farm reflects well on the whole town.
dialogue.Lewis.Task.Harvesting: A timely harvest keeps the local economy moving.
dialogue.Lewis.TaskFailure: We cannot proceed safely. I'll note the problem.
dialogue.Linus.Recruit: I can walk with you, if you welcome the company.
dialogue.Linus.Dismiss: I'll return to my quiet place. The wild is generous tonight.
dialogue.Linus.Idle: There is enough here for anyone who knows what to notice.
dialogue.Linus.Idle.rain: Rain reveals tracks that dry ground keeps hidden.
dialogue.Linus.Idle.night: Night is when the valley speaks most softly.
dialogue.Linus.Idle.place: Even tended land can live in harmony with the wild.
dialogue.Linus.Task.Foraging: Take only what is ready, and leave the rest to grow.
dialogue.Linus.TaskFailure: The land is asking us to leave this one alone.
dialogue.Marnie.Recruit: I'd love to help. Animals make any trip better.
dialogue.Marnie.Dismiss: I'll get back to the ranch and check on everyone.
dialogue.Marnie.Idle: Good work feels easier with friendly company.
dialogue.Marnie.Idle.rain: Rainy days make the barn feel extra cozy.
dialogue.Marnie.Idle.night: We should make sure every animal is settled for the night.
dialogue.Marnie.Idle.place: I can tell these animals are well cared for.
dialogue.Marnie.Task.Petting: Slow and gentle. Let them know you're a friend.
dialogue.Marnie.TaskFailure: They're not comfortable with this. Let's give them space.
dialogue.Maru.Recruit: Definitely. We can test a few ideas along the way.
dialogue.Maru.Dismiss: I'll head home and document what we learned.
dialogue.Maru.Idle: Every task gets easier once you understand the mechanism.
dialogue.Maru.Idle.rain: Rain is a useful stress test for anything left outdoors.
dialogue.Maru.Idle.night: Low light changes the variables more than people expect.
dialogue.Maru.Idle.place: The farm is full of systems working together.
dialogue.Maru.Task.Mining: A precise strike should expose the useful material.
dialogue.Maru.TaskFailure: The current approach failed. I'll revise the procedure.
dialogue.Pam.Recruit: Sure, why not? Beats standing around.
dialogue.Pam.Dismiss: I'm heading off. Don't make a big thing of it.
dialogue.Pam.Idle: A job goes faster when you quit staring and start moving.
dialogue.Pam.Idle.rain: Rain's fine as long as it doesn't get in my boots.
dialogue.Pam.Idle.night: It's late. Even I know when to call it.
dialogue.Pam.Idle.place: You have built yourself a pretty serious operation here.
dialogue.Pam.Task.Lumbering: Give it a solid hit and clear the way.
dialogue.Pam.TaskFailure: Well, that isn't budging. Find me something that will.
dialogue.Penny.Recruit: I'd be glad to help. We can take our time.
dialogue.Penny.Dismiss: I'll go home now. Thank you for including me.
dialogue.Penny.Idle: Quiet work can be very comforting.
dialogue.Penny.Idle.rain: The sound of rain makes it easier to think.
dialogue.Penny.Idle.night: It is late; I hope everyone made it home safely.
dialogue.Penny.Idle.place: There is something hopeful about a well-kept farm.
dialogue.Penny.Task.Watering: A little water now will help it grow tomorrow.
dialogue.Penny.TaskFailure: We should stop before we make the problem worse.
dialogue.Pierre.Recruit: All right. It never hurts to understand the supply side.
dialogue.Pierre.Dismiss: I'll get back to the store before I miss a customer.
dialogue.Pierre.Idle: Quality work is the beginning of a quality product.
dialogue.Pierre.Idle.rain: Rain keeps customers indoors, but the crops appreciate it.
dialogue.Pierre.Idle.night: I should not leave the shop unattended this late.
dialogue.Pierre.Idle.place: Now this is where the valley's best produce begins.
dialogue.Pierre.Task.Harvesting: Harvest it at the right moment and everyone benefits.
dialogue.Pierre.TaskFailure: We can't sell a ruined product. Leave this one for now.
dialogue.Robin.Recruit: You bet. Point me toward the work.
dialogue.Robin.Dismiss: I'll head back to the workshop. Good progress today.
dialogue.Robin.Idle: A solid plan saves twice as much time as it costs.
dialogue.Robin.Idle.rain: Rain shows you exactly where a structure needs attention.
dialogue.Robin.Idle.night: We need enough light to finish the job properly.
dialogue.Robin.Idle.place: This place has good bones. You've built on them well.
dialogue.Robin.Task.Lumbering: Keep the cut straight and the path will open cleanly.
dialogue.Robin.TaskFailure: That approach isn't sound. Let's find a safer one.
dialogue.Sam.Recruit: Yeah! This should be more fun than standing around.
dialogue.Sam.Dismiss: I'm gonna head out. That was a pretty good session.
dialogue.Sam.Idle: We've got a good rhythm going.
dialogue.Sam.Idle.rain: Rain makes the whole valley sound like a drum track.
dialogue.Sam.Idle.night: It's late, but I still have one more song in me.
dialogue.Sam.Idle.place: Working here has a surprisingly good beat.
dialogue.Sam.TaskFailure: Okay, that was definitely the wrong chord.
dialogue.Sandy.Recruit: A trip away from the shop? I'd love that.
dialogue.Sandy.Dismiss: I'll head back before the desert starts missing me.
dialogue.Sandy.Idle: A change of scenery is the best kind of refreshment.
dialogue.Sandy.Idle.rain: Rain still feels like a luxury to me.
dialogue.Sandy.Idle.night: The stars should be beautiful from here tonight.
dialogue.Sandy.Task.Foraging: Oh, this has exactly the right color.
dialogue.Sandy.TaskFailure: That route is no good, sweetie. Let's choose another.
dialogue.Sebastian.Recruit: Sure. Getting out for a while might be good.
dialogue.Sebastian.Dismiss: I'm heading back. I have a project waiting.
dialogue.Sebastian.Idle: Walking is easier when nobody expects small talk.
dialogue.Sebastian.Idle.rain: Rain makes the world quiet in a way I actually like.
dialogue.Sebastian.Idle.night: Night is when everything finally calms down.
dialogue.Sebastian.Idle.place: At least underground there is no glare.
dialogue.Sebastian.TaskFailure: The pathing is bad here. We need another approach.
dialogue.Shane.Recruit: Yeah, okay. Could be worse than another day alone.
dialogue.Shane.Dismiss: I'm done for now. Try not to get into trouble.
dialogue.Shane.Idle: At least there's something real to do out here.
dialogue.Shane.Idle.rain: Rain's not so bad when you stop fighting it.
dialogue.Shane.Idle.night: It's late. That's usually when bad ideas show up.
dialogue.Shane.Idle.place: The animals make this place easier to be around.
dialogue.Shane.Task.Petting: Hey, buddy. You're doing all right.
dialogue.Shane.TaskFailure: Nope. It's not working, and pushing harder won't help.
dialogue.Vincent.Recruit: Can I come? I promise I'll keep up!
dialogue.Vincent.Dismiss: I have to go home now. That was fun!
dialogue.Vincent.Idle: Maybe we'll find something nobody has ever seen.
dialogue.Vincent.Idle.rain: Puddles make the best tiny oceans.
dialogue.Vincent.Idle.night: Everything looks like a secret at night.
dialogue.Vincent.Idle.place: There are a million places to explore on a farm.
dialogue.Vincent.Task.Foraging: I found it! Do I get explorer points?
dialogue.Vincent.TaskFailure: Aw, we can't reach it. Let's find a different treasure.
dialogue.Willy.Recruit: Aye, I'll come along. A good crew watches each other's backs.
dialogue.Willy.Dismiss: I'll return to the water. The tide waits for no one.
dialogue.Willy.Idle: Patience finds more than a hurried pair of hands.
dialogue.Willy.Idle.rain: Rain on the water is an old, familiar song.
dialogue.Willy.Idle.night: Night has always been a fine companion at sea.
dialogue.Willy.Idle.place: The salt air tells me we're close to home.
dialogue.Willy.Task.Foraging: The shore gives up all sorts of useful things.
dialogue.Willy.TaskFailure: No use fighting a bad current. We'll change course.
dialogue.Wizard.Recruit: Very well. Our paths are aligned for the moment.
dialogue.Wizard.Dismiss: I must return to my studies beyond the veil.
dialogue.Wizard.Idle: The valley's currents shift around every living traveler.
dialogue.Wizard.Idle.rain: Rain strengthens certain currents of elemental energy.
dialogue.Wizard.Idle.night: The boundary between worlds feels thinner at night.
dialogue.Wizard.Idle.place: The arcane field is unusually stable here.
dialogue.Wizard.Task.Mining: This stone resonates with something beneath it.
dialogue.Wizard.TaskFailure: An opposing force seals this path. Do not disturb it.
multiplayer.version_mismatch: Pelican Companions version mismatch: local {{local}}, remote {{remote}}. Multiplayer companion features may be limited.
config.overview: Recommended start: keep the detailed quick HUD enabled, use the companion panel for per-NPC work, and lower the HUD row limit if it covers other mods.
config.section.controls.description: Keyboard shortcuts for recruiting, commands, inventory, and the full companion panel.
config.section.interface.description: HUD and feedback options. The detailed quick HUD shows names, status, level, work state, and inventory pressure on your chosen side of the screen.
config.quickActionWheelKey.name: Quick-action wheel key
config.quickActionWheelKey.description: Open contextual actions for the NPC, supported resource, or safe empty ground under the cursor.
config.controllerQuickActionWheelKey.des: Open the contextual action wheel from a controller. The default is clicking the left stick.
config.recruitKey.name: Recruit / manage key
config.recruitKey.description: Press near an NPC or pet to recruit them or open their companion management actions.
config.manualTaskKey.name: Manual task key
config.manualTaskKey.description: Press while aiming at a safe task target, such as dry crop soil.
config.openSquadInventoryKey.name: Open squad inventory key
config.openSquadInventoryKey.description: Open the shared squad inventory summary and withdrawal action.
config.tasksToggleKey.name: Task toggle key
config.tasksToggleKey.description: Enable or disable companion tasks while keeping followers active.
config.openCompanionPanelKey.name: Open companion panel key
config.openCompanionPanelKey.description: Open the graphical companion panel with levels, skills, inventories, and work toggles.
config.recallAllCompanionsKey.name: Recall all companions key
config.recallAllCompanionsKey.descriptio: Optional key to cancel local companion work and bring all of them back to following. Leave blank to disable.
config.showCompanionQuickHud.name: Show companion quick HUD
config.showCompanionQuickHud.description: Show the companion dock for quick work, recall, and panel commands.
config.companionQuickHudMode.name: Quick HUD layout
config.companionQuickHudMode.description: Detailed shows name, status, and level. Compact keeps only portraits and action buttons.
config.companionQuickHudSide.name: Quick HUD side
config.companionQuickHudSide.description: Choose which side of the screen holds the companion dock. The default is left.
config.companionQuickHudMaxRows.name: Quick HUD max rows
config.companionQuickHudMaxRows.descript: Maximum companion rows shown before the overflow button opens the full panel.
config.companionFormationMode.name: Companion formation
config.companionFormationMode.descriptio: Controls preferred follow offsets for companions near the player.
config.showCompanionMovementDebug.name: Show movement debug
config.showCompanionMovementDebug.descri: Show optional movement diagnostics for pathing, target tiles, distance, and recovery.
config.useSquadInventory.name: Use squad inventory
config.useSquadInventory.description: Store task outputs in a shared inventory instead of routing them directly to the player.
config.useVanillaDialogueUi.name: Use vanilla dialogue UI
config.useVanillaDialogueUi.description: Use Stardew Valley's native question dialogue to manage companions. Disable this to open the graphical companion panel instead.
config.enableCompanionProgression.name: Enable companion progression
config.enableCompanionProgression.descri: Allow companions to gain XP, level up, and unlock skill tree nodes.
config.companionInventorySlots.name: Companion inventory slots
config.companionInventorySlots.descripti: Number of item stacks each companion can carry. This PRD clamps the value to 10.
config.companionWorkRadius.name: Maximum companion work radius
config.companionWorkRadius.description: Radius used by nearby work searches and every new fixed work area.
config.companionWorkReturnDistance.name: Companion return distance
config.companionWorkReturnDistance.descr: Distance from the player where a working companion cancels the task and returns.
config.showCompanionLevelUpHud.name: Show level-up HUD
config.showCompanionLevelUpHud.descripti: Show a HUD message when a companion levels up.
config.friendshipRequirement.name: Required hearts
config.friendshipRequirement.description: Minimum hearts needed before an NPC can be recruited. Spouses and pets bypass this.
config.friendshipPointsPerHour.name: Friendship per hour
config.friendshipPointsPerHour.descripti: Friendship points awarded each in-game hour to recruited villagers.
config.maxSquadSize.name: Max squad size
config.maxSquadSize.description: Maximum companions one player can recruit at the same time.
config.recruitAllNpcs.name: Recruit all NPCs
config.recruitAllNpcs.description: Allow broader recruitment for non-friendable NPCs when they are safe targets.
config.disableInteraction.name: Disable companion interaction
config.disableInteraction.description: Controls whether normal talking or gifting should be avoided for companions. This setting does not change normal interaction in 0.2.0.
config.disableTrashRummagingReaction.des: Controls companion reactions to trash rummaging. This setting has no effect in 0.2.0.
config.enableCommunication.name: Enable communication
config.dialogueCooldownSeconds.name: Dialogue cooldown
config.dialogueCooldownSeconds.descripti: Minimum real seconds between ambient companion lines.
config.communicationGroupCooldownSeconds: Minimum real seconds between any two companion lines in the same player's group.
config.enablePetExpressions.name: Pet expressions
config.enablePetExpressions.description: Let pet companions react with emotes, movement, and their configured sounds instead of text.
config.enableIdleAnimations.name: Enable idle animations
config.enableIdleAnimations.description: Allow data-driven idle animation hooks when supported by future content.
config.enableGathering.name: Enable gathering
config.enableGathering.description: Controls routing for gathered items. Destructive gathering remains conservative in this build.
config.attackingMode.name: Attacking mode
config.harvestingMode.name: Harvesting mode
config.harvestingMode.description: Controls ripe crop harvesting assistance. Companions use Stardew Valley's standard harvest behavior, preserving normal produce, bonus drops, regrowth, and effects.
config.protectBeehouseFlowers.name: Beehouse flower protection
config.protectBeehouseFlowers.descriptio: Keep harvest-ready flowers within this many tiles of a bee house untouched. Set to zero to disable protection.
config.foragingMode.name: Foraging mode
config.lumberingMode.name: Lumbering mode
config.lumberingMode.description: Controls tree-chopping assistance. Autonomous scans for safe targets without a directive; directives and specialties can still focus the search. Companions use standard axe behavior, preserving normal wood, sap, seed, and other drops.
config.miningMode.name: Mining mode
config.miningMode.description: Controls rock and ore mining assistance. Autonomous scans for safe targets without a directive; directives and specialties can still focus the search. Companions use standard pickaxe and stone-destruction behavior, preserving normal drops and effects.
config.wateringMode.name: Watering mode
config.wateringMode.description: Controls crop watering assistance. Mimicking waters another nearby dry tile when the player uses a watering can, and the manual task key also works. Autonomous searches for dry crops on its own.
config.fishingMode.name: Fishing mode
config.pettingMode.name: Petting mode
config.pettingMode.description: Controls animal-petting assistance. Companions use the standard petting action, preserving friendship gains and normal animal state.
config.shearingMode.name: Shearing mode
config.milkingMode.name: Milking mode
config.milkingMode.description: Controls cow and goat milking assistance.
config.enableRiding.name: Enable riding
config.enableRiding.description: Reserved setting for horse-riding presentation. Current behavior keeps normal follow offsets.
config.enableSitting.name: Enable sitting
config.enableSitting.description: Reserved setting for sitting presentation. Sitting is not available in 0.2.0.
config.warpHomeOnDisconnect.name: Dismiss on disconnect
config.warpHomeOnDisconnect.description: If enabled, a disconnected player's following companions are dismissed by the host. Explicit Waiting orders are preserved.
config.parkTimeoutMinutes.name: Park timeout minutes
config.parkTimeoutMinutes.description: Real minutes before parked disconnected companions are dismissed. Zero disables timeout.
